package rulefixtures

import (
	"bytes"
)

// scenario for bytes_newbufferstring_on_string_conversion: `bytes.NewBufferString(string(b))` instead of using the byte slice directly.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: info.
func scenario455Negative(haystack []byte, needle []byte, left []byte, right []byte) bool {
	return bytes.Contains(haystack, needle)
}
